title: Assistant Store Manager - FitOn Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - FitOn Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with FitOn Holdings Services! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About FitOn Holdings Services:
FitOn Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FitOn Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
